# Fan

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Fan;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Fan { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
air, cooler, ventilation, ventilator, blower

## Categories
home
